# Execute Now (No More Loops)

## Objective (current)
Stand up 24/7 remote autonomous delivery pipeline with Codex-first execution and Claude as optional final-gate verifier.

## Immediate 60-minute Sprint
1. Confirm git baseline in trading_agent repo (in progress).
2. If no remote exists: create repo + set origin.
3. Add branch protections/checks plan.
4. Add CI skeleton (lint/test workflow placeholders).
5. Add autonomous runbook + decision queue wiring to repo.
6. Start continuous cycle cadence (manual trigger now; cron once VPS is live).

## Definition of Done for this sprint
- Repo is connected to GitHub.
- First automation scaffolding commit is pushed.
- Next 3 implementation tasks are queued with owners and acceptance criteria.

## Blockers
- Need approval for local git remote inspection command.
- Need GitHub destination (new repo name or existing URL).
